mapper.select: select id, user_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_price, quantity, create_time, update_time from shopping_cart where user_id = #{userId} order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into shopping_cart (user_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_price, quantity) values (#{userId}, #{dishId}, #{dishName}, #{dishPrice}, #{quantity})
